title: Too Many Achievements
description: A funny client-side Fabric mod that adds hundreds of weird, situational, and memorable achievements.
body:
# Too Many Achievements

**Too Many Achievements** is a client-side Fabric mod that adds hundreds of funny, strange, awkward, and oddly relatable achievements to Minecraft.

> This is not a mod about grinding.

This is a mod about getting an achievement because you stared at a wall for too long, survived something stupid, acted suspicious around villagers, or looked dramatically into the sky.

---

## ✨ What is this mod?

**Too Many Achievements** adds a custom achievement system inspired by vanilla advancements, but focused on humor, player behavior, and weird situations.

Instead of asking you to mine 500 blocks or kill 100 mobs, the mod rewards moments that feel alive:

- doing something awkward  
- almost dying in a dumb way  
- standing somewhere suspiciously  
- watching rain, lava, villagers, or nothing at all  
- accidentally creating a perfect Minecraft moment  

> **Make Minecraft notice the ridiculous things players already do.**

---

## ⚙️ Features

### 🎯 Core
- Hundreds of custom achievements  
- Funny, situational, and memorable unlocks  
- No grind-based achievements  
- Secret achievements hidden until unlocked  

### 🖥️ UI & Experience
- Custom achievement menu  
- Achievement search by name  
- Vanilla-inspired achievement tree  
- Zooming and panning  

### 🔔 Notifications
- Custom notifications  
- Short custom unlock sound  
- Configurable duration, position, and volume  
- Toggle notifications and sound on/off  

---

## 🎮 Opening the menu

You can open the Too Many Achievements menu in two ways:

- Press **U**  
- Use the command `/tma menu`  

---

## 🛠️ Commands

### `/tma menu`
Opens the custom achievement menu.

### `/tma duration`
Sets how long achievement notifications stay on screen.

### `/tma position`
Sets where achievement notifications appear on the screen.

> You can place them in different areas (top/bottom, left/right, etc.)

### `/tma centermenu`
Sets the current achievement menu camera position as default.

### `/tma settings`
Shows current Too Many Achievements settings.

### `/tma reset`
Completely resets your progress.  
> ⚠️ Use carefully.

### `/tma volume`
Sets notification sound volume.

### `/tma toggle`
Turns achievement notifications on or off.

### `/sound on` / `/sound off`
Turns notification sound on or off.

---

## 🧠 What kind of achievements?

This mod focuses on moments like:

- staring at a wall  
- standing in a corner  
- spinning your camera for no reason  
- acting strange near villagers  
- barely surviving disaster  
- making questionable decisions  
- observing the world a little too closely  
- accidentally doing something oddly specific  

Some achievements are obvious.  
Some are hidden.  

> Some will make you think:  
> **"Wait… the game noticed that?"**

---

## ❌ What this mod is NOT

This mod is **not** a checklist.

It does **not** focus on:

- doing something 100 times  
- breaking every block  
- repetitive copy-paste goals  
- progression that feels like homework  

> **Quality > quantity.**

---

## 🧩 Client-side

Too Many Achievements is a fully client-side Fabric mod.

It adds its own achievement system, UI, and notifications without replacing vanilla progression.

---

## 💡 Why?

Because Minecraft is full of small, weird, human moments.

> This mod makes them count.
